hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE '\b(go (build|run|vet|test)|templ generate)\b' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"air is running and already handles building and templ generate on file changes. Check tmp/build-errors.log for compile errors instead of running go build/run/vet/test or templ generate manually."}}' || echo '{}'
